fields.name: Service Contract No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service contract to which the service hours apply.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the service hours become valid.

fields.name: Day
fields.tooltip: Specifies the day when the service hours are valid.

fields.name: Starting Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting time of the service hours.

fields.name: Ending Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending time of the service hours.

fields.name: Valid on Holidays
fields.tooltip: Specifies that service hours are valid on holidays.

fields.name: Service Contract Type
fields.tooltip:
Contains the type of the contract. The following are the options: Contract or Quote.


Field


Description


Quote

Indicates a forerunner to a service contract in which your company makes an offer to the customer that needs customer approval before it is made into a service contract.


Contract

Indicates an agreement made between your company and the customer that specifies the coverage and the terms of the service obligation.


This field is filled in automatically.
